< Home >

GET restapi/personal/courses/{courseId}/calendarevents/v1?PageIndex={PageIndex}&PageSize={PageSize}&fromDate={fromDate}&toDate={toDate}

Gets the calendar events for the given course.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

The course identifier.

 integer

Required
PageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.
fromDate

From date for filtering calendar events.

 date

None.
toDate

To date for filtering calendar events.

 date

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.CalendarEvent
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EntityArray

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.CalendarEvent

None.
Total

integer

None.
CurrentPageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "EntityArray": [
    {
      "Id": 1,
      "FromDate": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
      "ToDate": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
      "EventTitle": "sample string 4",
      "Description": "sample string 5",
      "ImportDescription": "sample string 6",
      "CourseId": 7,
      "CourseGroupId": 8,
      "LocationColor": "sample string 9",
      "LocationFillColor": "sample string 10",
      "LocationTitle": "sample string 11",
      "LocationFriendlyName": "sample string 12",
      "AttendanceDetails": {
        "KeepAttendancePageUrl": "sample string 1",
        "AttendanceStatistics": {
          "Present": 1,
          "Absent": 2,
          "Excluded": 3
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "Id": 1,
      "FromDate": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
      "ToDate": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
      "EventTitle": "sample string 4",
      "Description": "sample string 5",
      "ImportDescription": "sample string 6",
      "CourseId": 7,
      "CourseGroupId": 8,
      "LocationColor": "sample string 9",
      "LocationFillColor": "sample string 10",
      "LocationTitle": "sample string 11",
      "LocationFriendlyName": "sample string 12",
      "AttendanceDetails": {
        "KeepAttendancePageUrl": "sample string 1",
        "AttendanceStatistics": {
          "Present": 1,
          "Absent": 2,
          "Excluded": 3
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "Total": 1,
  "CurrentPageIndex": 2,
  "PageSize": 3
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<EntityList xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CurrentPageIndex>2</CurrentPageIndex>
  <EntityArray>
    <CalendarEvent>
      <AttendanceDetails>
        <AttendanceStatistics>
          <Absent>2</Absent>
          <Excluded>3</Excluded>
          <Present>1</Present>
        </AttendanceStatistics>
        <KeepAttendancePageUrl>sample string 1</KeepAttendancePageUrl>
      </AttendanceDetails>
      <CourseGroupId>8</CourseGroupId>
      <CourseId>7</CourseId>
      <Description>sample string 5</Description>
      <EventTitle>sample string 4</EventTitle>
      <FromDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</FromDate>
      <Id>1</Id>
      <ImportDescription>sample string 6</ImportDescription>
      <LocationColor>sample string 9</LocationColor>
      <LocationFillColor>sample string 10</LocationFillColor>
      <LocationFriendlyName>sample string 12</LocationFriendlyName>
      <LocationTitle>sample string 11</LocationTitle>
      <ToDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</ToDate>
    </CalendarEvent>
    <CalendarEvent>
      <AttendanceDetails>
        <AttendanceStatistics>
          <Absent>2</Absent>
          <Excluded>3</Excluded>
          <Present>1</Present>
        </AttendanceStatistics>
        <KeepAttendancePageUrl>sample string 1</KeepAttendancePageUrl>
      </AttendanceDetails>
      <CourseGroupId>8</CourseGroupId>
      <CourseId>7</CourseId>
      <Description>sample string 5</Description>
      <EventTitle>sample string 4</EventTitle>
      <FromDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</FromDate>
      <Id>1</Id>
      <ImportDescription>sample string 6</ImportDescription>
      <LocationColor>sample string 9</LocationColor>
      <LocationFillColor>sample string 10</LocationFillColor>
      <LocationFriendlyName>sample string 12</LocationFriendlyName>
      <LocationTitle>sample string 11</LocationTitle>
      <ToDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</ToDate>
    </CalendarEvent>
  </EntityArray>
  <PageSize>3</PageSize>
  <Total>1</Total>
</EntityList>
